cases.test: should reuse the same animation name for vendor prefixed keyframes
should reuse the same animation name for vendor prefixed keyframes #1
should not touch animation names that are not defined in the file
should not touch animation names that are not defined in the file (uppercase)
should not touch keyframes that are not referenced in the file
should not touch keyframes & animation names, combined
should rename multiple counter styles & be aware of extensions
should not touch counter styles that are not referenced in the file
should not touch list-styles that are not defined in the file

cases.input: h1:before{counter-reset:chapter 1 section page 1;content: counter(chapter) 	 "."  counter(section) " (pg." counter(page) ") "}
cases.expected: h1:before{counter-reset:a 1 b c 1;content: counter(a) "." counter(b) " (pg." counter(c) ") "}

cases.test: should rename multiple counters with random order
cases.input: h1:before{content: counter(chapter) "." counter(section) " (pg." counter(page) ") ";counter-reset:chapter 1 section  page 1}
cases.expected: h1:before{content: counter(a) "." counter(b) " (pg." counter(c) ") ";counter-reset:a 1 b  c 1}

cases.test: should rename counters defined with counter-set
should rename counters with counter-set and counter-reset together
should not touch counters that are not outputted
should not touch counter functions which are not defined

cases.expected: body{grid-template-areas:"a a" "b c" "b d";}header { grid-area: a }nav{grid-area:b}main{grid-area:c}footer{grid-area:d}
body{grid-template-areas:"a a" "b c" "b d"; grid-template-rows: 1fr 1fr 1fr;}header { grid-area: a }nav{grid-area:b}main{grid-area:c}footer{grid-area:d}
body{GRID-TEMPLATE-AREAS:"a a" "b c" "b d";}header { GRID-AREA: a }nav{GRID-AREA:b}main{GRID-AREA:c}footer{GRID-AREA:d}

cases.input: body{grid-template: "head head" 50px "nav main" 1fr "...  foot" 30px / 150px 1fr;}header { grid-area: head }nav{grid-area:nav}main{grid-area:main}footer{grid-area:foot}
cases.expected: body{grid-template: "a a" 50px "b c" 1fr ". d" 30px / 150px 1fr;}header { grid-area: a }nav{grid-area:b}main{grid-area:c}footer{grid-area:d}

cases.test: should rename grid-column, grid-column-start and grid-column-end
cases.input:
body{grid-template-areas:". narrow ." 
"wide wide wide";}.narrow { grid-column: narrow }.wide{grid-column:wide}.left{grid-column:wide/narrow}.right{grid-column-start:narrow; grid-column-end: wide}
cases.expected: body{grid-template-areas:". a ." "b b b";}.narrow { grid-column: a }.wide{grid-column:b}.left{grid-column:b/a}.right{grid-column-start:a; grid-column-end: b}

cases.test: should rename grid-column, grid-column-start and grid-column-end (uppercase)
cases.input:
body{GRID-TEMPLATE-AREAS:". narrow ." 
"wide wide wide";}.narrow { GRID-COLUMN: narrow }.wide{GRID-COLUMN:wide}.left{GRID-COLUMN:wide/narrow}.right{GRID-COLUMN-START:narrow; GRID-COLUMN-END: wide}
cases.expected: body{GRID-TEMPLATE-AREAS:". a ." "b b b";}.narrow { GRID-COLUMN: a }.wide{GRID-COLUMN:b}.left{GRID-COLUMN:b/a}.right{GRID-COLUMN-START:a; GRID-COLUMN-END: b}

cases.test: should rename grid-row, grid-row-start and grid-row-end
cases.expected: body{grid-template-areas:"a ." "a b" "a .";}.full { grid-row: a }.middle{grid-row:b}.top{grid-row:a/b}.bottom{grid-row-start:b; grid-row-end: a}

cases.test: should rename grid-row, grid-row-start and grid-row-end (uppercase)
cases.expected: body{GRID-TEMPLATE-AREAS:"a ." "a b" "a .";}.full { GRID-ROW: a }.middle{GRID-ROW:b}.top{GRID-ROW:a/b}.bottom{GRID-ROW-START:b; GRID-ROW-END: a}

cases.test: should rename a list of grid-template-rows
should not rename uppercase reserved keywords in grid-row, grid-row-start and grid-row-end
cases.expected: body{grid-template-areas:"a ." "a b" "a .";}.full { grid-row: AUTO }.middle{grid-row:INHERIT}.top{grid-row:a/b}.bottom{grid-row-start:b; grid-row-end: a}

cases.test: should not rename reserved keywords in grid areas
